name: tar
description: Create, extract, or list contents of tar archives, optionally with compression

options.label: Create
options.description: Create a new archive from the specified files

options.label: Extract
options.description: Extract files from an existing archive

options.label: Verbose
options.description: List each file as it is processed

options.label: Gzip compression
options.description: Compress or decompress the archive using gzip

options.label: Archive file
options.description: Name of the archive file to create or extract from

options.label: Change directory
options.description: Change to the specified directory before performing operations

positionalArgs.label: Files
positionalArgs.description: Files or directories to include in the archive (for creation)

examples.label: Create a gzipped archive of a directory
Extract a gzipped archive to a specific directory
Extract to a specific output directory
Create a gzipped backup of the entire project
